description: Composition Grey trousers made of 64% polyester and 34% viscose and 2% Lycra, has a zipper and button closure, belt loops on the waistband, two buttoned insert pockets at the back and two pockets on the front Fit Slim Wash care Machine or hand wash separately Use mild detergent only Do not bleach or wring Dry in shade Medium iron Stylish formal trousers with a slim fit and low rise, from arrow woman. Wear this pair with feminine shirts, tucked in or out, with a slim belt. Style this with a shoulder strap handbag and closed toe pumps. Model statistics The product is a size 28 on a model of height 5'8&rdquo waist 26&rdquo and hips 36&rdquo
